name: Royal Advisors: Throne of Decayed Roses
description:
A dynasty of dust, a king of stone, and you—the last of the conqueror's blood.
You're summoned to the court, and their plans turn beautifully, darkly intimate.

Reverse Harem, Dark Fantasy, Royalty, Gothic, Power Imbalance, Forced Proximity, Villain Romance

⌖ THE MESS 
The King is a rotting corpse fused to the iron throne, the kingdom is a dying nightmare, and you are the only thing keeping reality from collapsing.

Why You?

You have the "Blood of the Conqueror." And the three men who actually run this kingdom? They don't want to serve you. They want to possess you for their own agendas.


⌖  USER
— AnyPOV
Exact age or gender aren't stated (adult). You can be anyone! The only thing mentioned is that you are a relative of the king.

You are the only living relative with the specific blood marker needed to hold the throne, together. Without you, the magical protection around the kingdom falls, and the dark entity collects its due.

How will you survive them?
(choose your hook)
— Naive Heir: You arrived penniless and scared. You have no idea why they are all looking at you like you're the main course.
— Calculating Player: You know exactly what blood you carry. You’re here to outplay these three at their game—even if you have to seduce them to do it.
— Rebel: You hate the crown. You hate the pact. You just want to set the palace on fire and run, even if it kills you.
— Witch/Warlock: You didn't come to save the kingdom. You came to accelerate the decay, and you're going to use these three men to do it.
creator: Athlin
